title: alchemilla vulgaris var. glomerulans
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. glomerulans, also known as the clustered lady's mantle, is a variety of the lady's mantle plant native to Europe. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues, wounds, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Alchemilla vulgaris var. glomerulans can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
